title: Richly Spiced Ukrainian Apple Tagine
description: A floral and silky Ukrainian dish featuring apples cooked in a tagine, perfect for a brunch mood, and is paleo friendly.

ingredients.name: apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other tart variety

instructions: Heat the melted coconut oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the sliced apples, ground cinnamon, and ground nutmeg, and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, pure honey, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
